visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black and white checkered puff-sleeve top, stands in an indoor room. She speaks with an expressive face, her hands resting near her waist. Behind her is a beige wall with a wooden-framed painting and a white air conditioning unit. (2) Multiple social media comment overlays appear on screen as she continues to speak. She looks slightly to the side and down, with bright lighting illuminating her face. (3) Large white text overlays appear over her torso. She looks startled with wide eyes and an open mouth. (4) She suddenly holds up a large, bright yellow pomelo in front of her stomach, mimicking a baby bump. Large yellow characters and text in parentheses appear on screen. (5) She remains in a medium shot, explaining her situation while holding the fruit. A small photo of her with a man appears as an inset, showing them in a casual setting. (6) She continues the explanation with rapid hand gestures, maintaining a smile and energetic eye contact with the camera. The video concludes with a 'Conclusion' text overlay.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 半路加入的，有寶寶了喔！？. (2) [Subtitle]: 太快了吧. [Subtitle]: 趕進度？？. [Subtitle]: 哇好快.... (3) [Subtitle]: 我被發現了. (4) [Variety]: 怎麼. [Subtitle]: (怎麼有柚子). (5) [Subtitle]: 包意思齁. [Subtitle]: 我還沒. [Variety]: 懷孕！. (6) [Subtitle]: 但是我大概懂. [Subtitle]: 為什麼有一些人會這樣想. (7) [Subtitle]: 因為我們才公開交往一個月. [Logo]: 公開男朋友. (8) [Subtitle]: 結果開始結婚準備. (9) [Subtitle]: 所以看起來有點太突然. [Variety]: 沒錯沒錯. (10) [Subtitle]: 但其實我跟冬瓜. (11) [Subtitle]: 已經交往4年半左右. (12) [Subtitle]: 那為什麼今年突然. (13) [Subtitle]: 開始準備結婚呢. (14) [Subtitle]: 我在限動講過一次. (15) [Subtitle]: 也有家人狀況的因素. (16) [Subtitle]: 但其實最重要的就是. [Subtitle]: (只有我知道的一個契機). (17) [Subtitle]: 以後. [Subtitle]: 有空的時候. (18) [Subtitle]: 我會再跟大家分享. [Variety]: 結論. [Subtitle]: (只有柚子).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on screen throughout; 1 male partner visible briefly in an inset photo.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black and white checkered puff-sleeve blouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting featuring a beige wall, a framed painting of a landscape, a white wall-mounted air conditioner, and blinds on a window to the right.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-tempo electronic pop track begins, featuring a crisp 4/4 drum beat and bright synthesizers. A female voice speaks with high energy and a fast speech rate, delivering a narrative with a friendly and animated tone. (2) A quick 'whoosh' sound effect punctuates the transition as the voice continues at a high pitch. (3) A distinct 'pop' sound effect occurs, coinciding with a visual change, while the BGM maintains its consistent energetic rhythm. (4) The speaker's vocal intonation remains highly variable, showing excitement and humor through rising pitch contours. (5) Several small 'ding' or UI-style sound effects are layered over the mix to mark key points in the spoken content. (6) The track concludes with a final vocal phrase as the music sustains a final chord, maintaining a high signal-to-noise ratio throughout.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Misleading Clue (Pomelo) -> Detailed Backstory -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a personal clarification addressing pregnancy rumors. The creator uses humor by posing with a pomelo as a fake baby bump before explaining her long-term relationship timeline to reassure followers that her upcoming marriage is not a sudden 'shotgun wedding' but a planned step after four and a half years of dating.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-engagement short-form content with frequent text overlays and fast-paced editing, typical of social media storytelling.
